posts.author: innsite (Aaron Busary)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have created a app with workspace feature. I have template workspace, when I use the app in new Workspaces, all the boards from my template workspace is getting created.
However, in my template workspace I have boards in particular folders, these folders are not getting created when the app is used in new workspace.

Screenshot 2024-02-22 at 5.47.26 PM322×662 28.4 KB

Screenshot 2024-02-22 at 5.47.18 PM326×691 34.4 KB
